title: [Control systems] Mitsubishi Electric security advisory (AV26-616)
description: On June 18, 2026, Mitsubishi Electric published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: FX5-EIP EtherNet/IP Module FX5-EIP   version 1.000 and prior
FX5-ENET/IP Ethernet Module FX5-ENET/IP   all versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
